n: Instance: The Feast of the Running Stag

steps.t: The Feast of the Running Stag is about to begin.
You should perform the <rgb=#FF0000>/sit</rgb> emote near the bonfire to observe the festival.
The Elder's ritual crown can be found at the doorway from which he entered. You should collect the crown and carry it carefully to the Elder.
The Elder's ritual horse-tail can be found at the doorway from which he entered. You should collect the horse-tail and carry it carefully to the Elder…
The Elder's ritual spear can be found at the doorway from which he entered. You should collect the spear and carry it carefully to the Elder when he i…
The Feast of the Running Stag continues.
Elain is at the Feast of the Running Stag. You should speak with Elain about the injured crow and the missing southern family.
